DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lindsey A. Morgan, Esq. of Sinnott Puebla Campagne & Curet, (415-352-6202), for PG&E, Defendant and moving party.
Marc Libarle, Esq., (415-928-2400), for John F. Hudson, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court announces its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer as to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Demurrer as to private nuisance is overruled if negligence cause of action cannot be pled. Demurrer as to public nuisance is sustained with leave to amend. Defendant and moving party submits to the tentative ruling. Plaintiff through its counsel presents oral arguments.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend within two weeks of the Notice of Entry of Order. Prevailing party to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Oct-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lindsey A. Morgan, Esq. of Sinnott Puebla Campagne & Curet, (415-352-6202), for PG&E, Defendant and moving party.
Marc Libarle, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-928-2400), for John F. Hudson, Plaintiff and opposing party.

No arguments heard. Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 8, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 19, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Parties waive notice. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
